title: Lattice-BP++ E2E testing on stagenet
description:
## Context
Wire privacy screen to real confidential TX. N=256, q=8380417, K=4.
OP_LATTICEBP_RANGEPROOF=0xfa at witness v4.
## Files
- src/crypto/latticebp/range_proof.cpp
- src/crypto/latticebp/commitment.cpp
- src/script/interpreter.cpp (witness v4)
## Acceptance
- [ ] Send confidential TX on stagenet
- [ ] Verify range proof
- [ ] LatticeFold accumulator updates
- [ ] Key-image prevents double-spend

title: USDSOQ E2E testing on stagenet
description:
## Context
Wire stablecoin to real stagenet. Opcodes: MINT=0xf4, BURN=0xf5, FREEZE=0xf6, ROTATE=0xf7.
## Files
- src/consensus/usdsoq.cpp + .h
- src/script/interpreter.cpp
- src/test/usdsoq_tests.cpp
## Acceptance
- [ ] Mint USDSOQ on stagenet via RPC
- [ ] Transfer between addresses
- [ ] Burn and verify supply tracking
- [ ] Freeze/unfreeze addresses
